prompt.asset_type: dashboard hero background for a TypeScript multiplayer board-game MVP
prompt.primary_request: Create an original alternate theme arena for an elemental companion board game, distinct from existing elemental-league art.
prompt.scene: A crystalline sky observatory arena with floating game tables, colored elemental lanterns, polished stone floor, and soft aurora light in the distance.
prompt.constraints: Original IP only; no official Pokemon, Splendor, Nintendo, or Asmodee marks; no text; no logos; no watermark.
